misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: table of contents for May 1923 issue, publication information (organ of Relief Society, subscription rates, address), multiple advertisements for local businesses (undertakers, banks, jewelers, clothing stores, food products, etc.), subscription management notices, and some fragmentary text snippets that appear to be incomplete portions of articles already extracted. The fragments are too short and incomplete to constitute standalone articles - they appear to be leftover pieces from the automated extraction process of the main articles already identified.
